content:
## Dairy farming accredited employer
I am Bsc Hons Agriculture graduate.
I required job in agriculture and farming sector i.e. dairy farm assistant job role in dairy farming under Accredited Employer Work Visa.
I am Bsc Hons Agriculture gradute. I required job in agriculture and farming sector i.e. dairy farm assistant job role in dairy farming under Accredited Employer Work Visa.

### Response from Landcorp Farming Limited
Status Dataset submitted
Comments Pāmu - Landcorp is an Accredited Employer, and we regularly post our vacant positions on our careers page at www.pamunewzealand.com/careers. If you’re interested in joining our team, please apply directly through that site. This helps us ensure that your application is properly assessed and considered for any suitable roles.

#### Likely Source Agency
Landcorp Farming Limited
